_comment: Subagent model selection per host — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. The skill selects the provider it is currently running under and passes that provider's model_id to build_analysis_manifest.py and every spawned day / code-analysis subagent. Defaults prioritise cost efficiency for bounded, per-day repository analysis. Do NOT silently replace these models with more expensive ones. Resolved by scripts/resolve_provider_model.py; mirrored (human-facing) in references/provider-models.md.
